title: Photograph
why_this_song: Photograph by Nickelback (2005) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 13 times; first heard in: "Goodbye, goodbye"
Appears 11 times; first heard in: "Every time I do, it makes me laugh"
Appears 10 times; first heard in: "Every time I do, it makes me laugh"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "The second floor is hard for sneaking out"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "I wonder if it's too late"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Every memory of walking out the front door
I found the photo of the friend that I was looking for
It's hard to say it, time to say it
Every time I do, it makes me laugh
How did our eyes get so red?
And what the hell is on Joey's head?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "goodbye" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "goodbye" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "every" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "every" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I haven't seen her since God knows when

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Every time I do, it makes me laugh
They say, "Somebody went and burned it down"
Every memory of walking out the front door

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Photograph" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Photograph" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Photograph" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Photograph", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Photograph" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Photograph" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
